text: R&D investment intensity remained elevated at 16.31% of revenue in Q4 2025, with R&D expenses totaling $18.6 billion. This represents a meaningful increase from $15.2 billion in Q3 and $13.6 billion in Q1, reflecting the company's aggressive investment posture in generative AI capabilities and advertising technology enhancements. The sustained high R&D intensity underscores management's commitment to maintaining technological leadership despite near-term margin pressure, positioning the company for long-term competitive advantage in AI-driven search and cloud services.
